subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablih-Husayn! That most enraptured Secret which lay concealed and treasured within the Preserved Tablet hath appeared in human form [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسین آن سر مستسریکه در لوح محفوظ مکنون و مخزون بود در هیکل انسان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
